name: 개력입성
python_code:
Period = (300)
D1 = (0.7)
_KVAR_0 = (_MAX((df['close']), (df['open'])))

_KVAR_2 = (_highest((_KVAR_0), (60)))
_KVAR_3 = (_lowest((_KVAR_1), (60)))
_KVAR_4 = ((_KVAR_2-_KVAR_3)/_KVAR_3*100)
A1 = (_KVAR_4 * (1)<30) & ((((df['close']).shift(1) <= (_KVAR_2 * (1)).shift(1)) & ((df['close']) > (_KVAR_2 * (1))))) & (_highest((df['volume']), (60))<df['volume'])
A2 = ((((df['high']).shift(1) <= (TI.bbands(df['close'], (Period), (D1))[0]).shift(1)) & ((df['high']) > (TI.bbands(df['close'], (Period), (D1))[0])))) & (df['volume']>=df['volume'].shift(1)*10)
A3 = ((TI.vr(df['close'], df['open'], df['volume'], (20))-TI.vr(df['close'], df['open'], df['volume'], (60)))/TI.vr(df['close'], df['open'], df['volume'], (60))*100)
cond = ((((df['close']).shift(1) <= ((df['close']).rolling((60)).mean()).shift(1)) & ((df['close']) > ((df['close']).rolling((60)).mean())))) & (A3>=100)
